domain_description: Generic governed implementation orchestration - bounded implementation, review, rule compliance, learning, parity audit, and terminal closeout.
focus_areas: Authority model: fixed engine contract distinct from review contract and target contract
Boundary discipline: top-level orchestrator, not replacement for every shared engine
Source-baseline discipline: prior ARB artifacts are migration references, not compliance baselines unless explicitly imported as authority
Target-governance completeness: writable surface, target contract, target rulebook, target review prompt, authority docs, runtime review configuration, outputs, and stop conditions
Terminal semantics: mutually exclusive triggers including pre-review pushback and frozen_with_conditions
Artifact lifecycle: staged candidate, immutable staged-final snapshot, canonical or staged outputs, and run-scoped evidence
Parity discipline: role markdown, role contract, artifact matrix, completion clauses, preserved history, and terminal payload must align
Gatekeeper routing: rulebook, contract, validator or enforcer, prompt, and docs surfaces
Concurrency discipline: one bounded write domain per run and versioned promotion

severity_definitions.blocking: Prevents safe or governable use. Must be fixed before any frozen state.
severity_definitions.major: Significant governance or lifecycle gap. Must be fixed before any frozen state.
severity_definitions.minor: Non-blocking inconsistency. May be frozen with conditions.
severity_definitions.suggestion: Nice-to-have improvement. Does not affect freeze legality.

ignore_areas: Do not redesign unrelated ADF components.
Do not invent domain-specific semantics that belong to the invoker.
Do not treat shared component-repair-engine as a required steady-state dependency.
full_sweep_rounds: first and last (when no pushbacks found)
